---
title: "Lecture 20 Quiz: Objects & Object Literals"
jupyter: julia-1.12
---

::: {.callout-note}
Review before quiz:
[Lectures](/lectures/lecture-20.qmd) | [Week 5 Content](/content/week-05.qmd) | [Lab 5](/labs/lab-05.qmd) | [Home Assignment 2](/assignment/02-assignment.qmd)
:::

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
using QuizQuestions
```

## Lecture 20 Self-Check

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. HTML and CSS only", "B. Unit I and Unit II concepts", "C. Databases only", "D. Spring Boot only"]
question = "Question 1: This revision lecture mainly prepares students for questions from:"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `<table>`", "B. `<section>`", "C. `<form>`", "D. `<canvas>`"]
question = "Question 2: Which HTML element is specifically used to collect and submit user input?"
answer = 3
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `#header`", "B. `header#`", "C. `.header`", "D. `header()`"]
question = "Question 3: Which CSS selector targets an element by id?"
answer = 1
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. Margin is inside the border", "B. Padding is outside the margin", "C. Padding is inside the border and around content", "D. Border is removed in box model calculations"]
question = "Question 4: Which statement about the CSS box model is correct?"
answer = 3
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `querySelector`", "B. `addEventListener`", "C. `innerHTML`", "D. All of these"]
question = "Question 5: Which JavaScript features are commonly used when revising DOM interaction?"
answer = 4
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```
